author: Xbox YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH - LAUNCH TRAILER
The Unknown Journey Continues

FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH is now available on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as part of XBOX Play Anywhere.
 
A free demo is also available. Save data carries over to the full game.

About the game: After escaping the dystopian city of Midgar, join Cloud and his friends on an epic journey across the planet in pursuit of Sephiroth. Ride chocobos, sprint across sweeping plains, and explore a vibrant, expansive world. Experience new features and encounters as the story unfolds, culminating in the party’s journey to the Forgotten Capital from the original FINAL FANTASY VII.

Buy now: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/final-fantasy-vii-rebirth/9NP9F7WWKRP1/0010
Demo: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/final-fantasy-vii-rebirth-demo/9pjd7t6ms6k7

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Onimusha: Way of the Sword: Release Date Announcement
Onimusha: Way of the Sword, an all-new entry in Capcom's swordplay action series, will be released on Friday, September 25, 2026!

Check out the newest trailer for a first glimpse of the Mount Oe stage, and the fearsome boss who waits there, Shuten Doji.

Pre-order now:
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/onimusha-way-of-the-sword/9pjmhtrc9wkb

Play the demo: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/onimusha-way-of-the-sword-demo/9nztx68hkj6n

- Footage represents a game still in development.
- Some footage was captured with enemy dismemberment death effects disabled.

Onimusha: Way of the Sword, an all-new entry in the Onimusha series, plunges the Oni Gauntlet wielding protagonist, Miyamoto Musashi into an early Edo-period Kyoto under siege by monstrous fiends known as Genma. Feel the ring of steel on steel as blades clash in a tense back and forth duels. Cut down foes with authentic and satisfying swordplay. Awaken Oni Powers to pull off superhuman feats. All these elements combine to deliver an unprecedented swordplay action experience you will not want to miss.

©CAPCOM

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Dune: Awakening - Console Announcement Story Trailer
Dune: Awakening, the Open World Survival game set in one of science fiction's most iconic universes, is coming to XBOX Series X|S, XBOX on PC and XBOX Game Pass on September 22nd. Featuring a brand new single-player mode, a new chapter in its cinematic storyline, and many more additions and improvements, this is the definitive version of the game. Arrakis doesn't wait. Neither should you. 

Pre-order now.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dune-awakening/9pj6fv3130qz

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE | Release Date Trailer
That’s where the Wings of Theve comes in… the legendary savior. 

ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE releases October 2nd, 2026!
Pre-order now to unlock the F-14A aircraft and exclusive access to ACE COMBAT 0: The Belkan War: Standard Edition Pre-Order - https://www.xbox.com/games/store/game/9MWJ5CX0WBBR
Deluxe Edition Pre-Order - https://www.xbox.com/games/store/game/9NQCCNW8HDGC

The Deluxe Edition of ACE COMBAT 8: WINGS OF THEVE includes:
• Base Game
• 3 days of Early Access
• Customizable Cosmetic Set
• Premium Ace Pass Plus Voucher 

Take to the skies in style with the Joker Flight Pack, including all content from the Deluxe Edition, plus an Official 200-page Artbook, 2 LP Vinyl Records, Slipcase, and Slipmat!

#ACECOMBAT8 #WingsOfTheve

Fallout 76: Infestations - Gameplay Trailer - Available Now
Play the latest free update today – Infestations! 

Explore, quest, build, craft, and fight across a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Appalachia’s familiar places can host some unfriendly faces with Infestations. Rediscover “infested” areas across the map teeming with high-level foes and high-level loot, including new 4-Star Legendary weapons and armor mods!
